llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Expanded Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) to ₹15,000 crore from ₹10,000 crore due to strong investor demand, indicating robust market confidence.

Share price plunged over 8% after a ₹1,741 crore block deal (2.37% of company's equity at ₹1,601 apiece), reportedly by Singapore's sovereign wealth fund Temasek Holdings reducing its stake. This follows recent stake sales by co-founders and Tencent.

Shares are up 1.87% amid an IT sector rebound. Multiple domestic brokerages (ICICI Direct, PL Capital, Systematix) have maintained 'Buy' ratings. The company was named a Leader in IDC MarketScape for Life Sciences R&D Strategic Consulting and successfully modernized payroll with SAP Cloud ERP. Board meeting on July 9, 2026, to consider Q1 results and interim dividend.

The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting (MIB) has suspended BARC TV ratings across all genres, creating significant uncertainty for the commercial rollout of major global sporting properties (like the 2026 FIFA World Cup, for which Zee holds rights). This blackout impacts advertising negotiations and the ability to measure revenue effectiveness.

Suspended flight operations from Chennai and reduced overall flights by 44% due to severe fleet shortage (available fleet shrunk to 12-13 aircraft from over 30) and ongoing operational/financial challenges. Faces liquidity crunch, delayed employee payments, and regulatory scrutiny (EOW case). Continues to face pressures despite recent Qualified Institutional Placements (QIPs).
